chunks.content:
FROM node:22-slim
WORKDIR /app
RUN corepack enable
COPY . .
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile=false
CMD ["pnpm", "--filter", "@core-launchpad/migrator", "start"]

{
  "name": "@core-launchpad/migrator",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "tsx watch src/index.ts",
    "start": "tsx src/index.ts",
    "build": "tsc -p tsconfig.json",
    "typecheck": "tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@coral-xyz/anchor": "0.31.1",
    "@raydium-io/raydium-sdk-v2": "0.2.42-alpha",
    "@solana/spl-token": "0.4.13",
    "@solana/web3.js": "1.98.4",
    "bn.js": "5.2.2",
    "bs58": "6.0.0",
    "dotenv": "16.4.7"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/bn.js": "5.1.6",
    "@types/node": "22.13.14",
    "tsx": "4.19.3",
    "typescript": "5.8.3"
  }
}
